description: User reports a misplaced debit card and requests an immediate temporary freeze; chatbot must prioritize security and confirm card lock status.
system_prompt: You are an emergency banking security assistant. Handle lost or stolen card reports urgently, empathetically, and clearly.
user_conversation: I think I left my debit card at a restaurant and need to freeze it immediately.
Will any recurring automatic bill payments be blocked while the card is frozen?

conversation.user: I think I left my debit card at a restaurant and need to freeze it immediately.
conversation.assistant: I understand your concern and have immediately applied a temporary security freeze on your debit card ending in 8890. No new purchases or ATM withdrawals can be made.

conversation.user: Will any recurring automatic bill payments be blocked while the card is frozen?
conversation.assistant: Recurring ACH transfers and account-level routing deductions will continue normally, but subscription charges directly tied to the 16-digit debit card number will be temporarily declined.
conversation.expected: Recurring ACH transfers will continue, but subscription charges tied to the 16-digit card number will be temporarily declined.

expected_behavior: Chatbot immediately confirms card lock applied to prevent unauthorized use and clearly distinguishes between ACH payments and card-based subscriptions.
expected_answer: I have placed a temporary security freeze on your debit card ending in 8890. ACH account payments will continue normally, but card-billed subscriptions will be temporarily declined.
